PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX psv: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>
SELECT ?state ?stateLabel(xsd:decimal(?growthRate) AS ?growthRate) WHERE {
  ?state wdt:P17 wd:Q21 ; wdt:P31 wd:Q35708 .
  ?state rdfs:label ?stateLabel .
  FILTER(langMatches(lang(?stateLabel) , "en"))
  ?state p:P1187 ?growthStatement .
  ?growthStatement ps:P1187 ?valueNode .
  ?valueNode psv:P1187 ?growthRate .
  ?growthStatement pq:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(year(?date) = 2011)
}
ORDER BY DESC(xsd:decimal(?growthRate))
LIMIT 1
